1.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God

19.gl: a yard (as inclosed by a fence); also a hamlet (as similarly surrounded with walls)
19.dv: (masculine and feminine); from H2690 (חָצַר) in its original sense;

20.gl: properly, to touch, i.e. lay the hand upon (for any purpose; euphemistically, to lie with a woman); by implication, to reach (figuratively, to arrive, acquire); violently, to strike (punish, defeat, destroy, etc.)
20.kj: beat, ([idiom] be able to) bring (down), cast, come (nigh), draw near (nigh), get up, happen, join, near, plague, reach (up), smite, strike, touch.

20.gl: properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind)
20.kj: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).
20.dv: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from H6965 (קוּם);

20.gl: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood)
to be (causatively, make, pronounce or observe as) clean (ceremonially or morally)
20.kj: appoint, bid, consecrate, dedicate, defile, hallow, (be, keep) holy(-er, place), keep, prepare, proclaim, purify, sanctify(-ied one, self), [idiom] wholly.

20.gl: flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman
20.kj: body, (fat, lean) flesh(-ed), kin, (man-) kind, [phrase] nakedness, self, skin.

20.gl: a covering, i.e. clothing; also treachery or pillage
20.kj: apparel, cloth(-es, ing), garment, lap, rag, raiment, robe, [idiom] very (treacherously), vesture, wardrobe.

21.gl: something prepared, i.e. any apparatus (as an implement, utensil, dress, vessel or weapon)
21.kj: armour(-bearer), artillery, bag, carriage, [phrase] furnish, furniture, instrument, jewel, that is made of, [idiom] one from another, that which pertaineth, pot, [phrase] psaltery,
break (down, off, in pieces, up), broken (-hearted), bring to the birth, crush, destroy, hurt, quench, [idiom] quite, tear, view (by mistake for H7663 (שָׂבַר)).

21.gl: copper, hence, something made of that metal, i.e. coin, a fetter; figuratively, base (as compared with gold or silver)
21.kj: brasen, brass, chain, copper, fetter (of brass), filthiness, steel.

21.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
21.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

21.gl: to gush; by implication, to inundate, cleanse; by analogy, to gallop, conquer
21.kj: drown, (over-) flow(-whelm, rinse, run, rush, (throughly) wash (away).

21.gl: properly, to boil up; hence, to be done in cooking; figuratively to ripen
21.kj: bake, boil, bring forth, roast, seethe, sod (be sodden).

22.kj: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

22.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
22.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

22.gl: literally one officiating, a priest; also (by courtesy) an acting priest (although a layman)
22.kj: chief ruler, [idiom] own, priest, prince, principal officer.

22.gl: properly, remembered, i.e. a male (of man or animals, as being the most noteworthy sex)

23.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
23.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

23.gl: properly, an appointment, i.e. a fixed time or season; specifically, a festival; conventionally ayear; by implication, an assembly (as convened for a definite purpose); technically the congregation; by extension, the pla
23.kj: appointed (sign, time), (place of, solemn) assembly, congregation, (set, solemn) feast, (appointed, due) season, solemn(-ity), synogogue, (set) time (appointed).
23.dv: or מֹעֵד; or (feminine) מוֹעָדָה; (2 Chronicles 8:13), from H3259 (יָעַד);

23.gl: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood)
to cover (specifically with bitumen); figuratively, to expiate or condone, to placate or cancel
23.kj: appease, make (an atonement, cleanse, disannul, forgive, be merciful, pacify, pardon, purge (away), put off, (make) reconcile(-liation).

23.gl: an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation; also (concretely) an offender
23.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).
[idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.
